textByHashes.3a03dc7971be37a095124f2ed49cbd9e36b3c3c8: More toys! I want MORE TOYS!
textByHashes.64e592de2a84258ddac359ed5c08164f038cd387: I hate you! HATE YOU! Where's my mommy?
textByHashes.9c2380ad207e1016eca55cc7d0ffbad5bc243c78: Someone killed scruffy. I liked scruffy. He never told me off.
textByHashes.9780b11f730171518365500197fb5333f34812ea: Mommy said you're here to kill all the nasty men that keep breaking in.
textByHashes.33fc5b4db3b68d68d9beafb390253be6fd170a31: Have you got me some toys?
textByHashes.fffa74105fec17929e81e5603316a4f6fb959cba: Mommy said you're here to kill all the nasty people that keep breaking in.
textByHashes.a8c7cf75c51f183bb21b231a561114c2368e67fc: Daddy says you don't like Mr Jones. Mr Jones is nice. He brings me toys and sweets.
textByHashes.4ab5ec3d9a9bb808c3f59f0b0065ce4ff4396252: Well if you think that, I don't like you!
textByHashes.515431fe3b9edfee9abc78da6e6a2df6d827abd0: What have you brought me? I want some more toys!
textByHashes.c6e544977d2ec9b00db21e7273ab68c032396800: It's not fair! All the bad things keep happening to us! Why don't they happen to anyone else?
textByHashes.1015bb5b8307e836ec2754402f99802f4d5f7f5b: I shouldn't talk to you. You might be one of the bad people.
textByHashes.9fba68254475159f4e50aa65750caab35372fc8e: Then you're useless! Leave me alone!
textByHashes.ce28ba2bf45cf6596d73c290f8142644b234d011: I shouldn't talk to you. You might be one of the bad people. The guard said I should be careful of the bad people.
textByHashes.468cd953d395263bcb1ce44b04fb59c3b3d4da72: No! I was in bed. Now leave me alone! I don't want to talk to you.
textByHashes.e5c50a1131606183f71fbc56135af0d146e2ee0b: I don't want to talk to you.
